# Issue #2107: [BUG] String to replace not found in file.
**State:** closed | **Author:** liaolunhui

## Environment
- Platform (select one):
  - [ ] Other: Claude code
- Claude CLI version: 1.0.24
- Operating System: Windows 11
- Terminal:  IDEA Claude code plugin

## Bug Description
Occasionally updating error: String to replace not found in file.

## Steps to Reproduce
Occasionally updating error: String to replace not found in file.

## Expected Behavior
update file successfully.

## Actual Behavior
Occasionally updating error: String to replace not found in file.

No
